recommendations.title: One Hour Photo
recommendations.overview: Sy Parrish has lovingly developed photographs for the Yorkin family since their son was a baby. But as the Yorkins' lives become fuller, Sy's only seems lonelier, until he eventually convinces himself he's part of their family. When Sy's picture-perf

recommendations.title: HIStory on Film, Volume II
recommendations.overview: Nearly 2 hours of the short films that made HIStory... Including never before released short films.
recommendations.director: Spike Lee, James Yukich, Mark Romanek, Colin Chilvers, Vincent Paterson, Don Mischer, Wayne Isham, Nicholas Brandt, John Landis, Bob Giraldi

recommendations.title: Lemonade
recommendations.overview: The second "visual album" (a collection of short films) by Beyoncé, this time around she takes a piercing look at racial issues and feminist concepts through a sexualized, satirical, and solemn tone.
recommendations.director: Kahlil Joseph, Melina Matsoukas, Dikayl Rimmasch, Mark Romanek, Beyoncé, Todd Tourso, Jonas Åkerlund

recommendations.title: Close
recommendations.overview: Two 13-year-old boys spend an idyllic summer together, but their connection is put to the test when they become the subject of speculation at school.

recommendations.title: Like Stars on Earth
recommendations.overview: Ishaan Awasthi is an eight-year-old whose world is filled with wonders that no one else seems to appreciate. Colours, fish, dogs, and kites don't seem important to the adults, who are much more interested in things like homework, marks, and neatness.

recommendations.title: Stuck in Love
recommendations.overview: An acclaimed writer, his ex-wife, and their teenaged children come to terms with the complexities of love in all its forms over the course of one tumultuous year.

recommendations.title: Close Range Love
recommendations.overview: A smart high school student falls in love with her English teacher after she receives one-on-one tutoring from him.

recommendations.title: From Beginning to End
recommendations.overview: Two brothers develop a very close relationship as they are growing up in an idyllic and happy family. When they are young adults their relationship becomes very intimate, romantic, and sexual.

recommendations.title: Prelude to a Kiss
recommendations.overview: A couple fall in love despite the girl's pessimistic outlook. As they struggle to come to terms with their relationship, something supernatural happens that tests it.

recommendations.title: Mädchen in Uniform
recommendations.overview: A sensitive girl is sent to an all-girls boarding school and develops a romantic attachment to one of her teachers.
